avisos.texto_aviso: Parents must sign their child in and out at the front gate every day.
Students must present a valid ID card to borrow equipment from the science labs.
Level placement tests are held every Monday at 9 a.m.; no appointment necessary.
One-on-one sessions must be booked at least 24 hours in advance; walk-ins are not guaranteed.
Please switch off all mobile phones before the professor begins; latecomers must wait outside until the break.

banco_opciones.H: employee parking area (reservada para el ejemplo 0)

avisos.texto_aviso: This room must be booked in advance through the online calendar; unbooked meetings will be asked to relocate.
All requests for leave must be submitted at least two weeks before the intended start date.
Visitors must sign in and wear a badge at all times while on the premises.
Please log a ticket online before calling; urgent hardware issues are prioritized.
Toner cartridges are replaced every Friday; please report any paper jams to the office manager immediately.
No outside food or drinks are allowed inside the screening rooms.
Riders must be at least 1.4 meters tall to access the roller coasters.
Shoe rental is included in the price of each game; socks must be worn at all times.
Flash photography is not permitted near the paintings; please keep a respectful distance from the artwork.
A minimum spend of one drink or snack per person applies for groups staying longer than two hours.
Maximum capacity: 8 people or 630 kg. Please do not overload during peak hours.
Machines must be emptied within 30 minutes of the cycle ending, or items may be removed by staff.
Access closes at 10 p.m. on weekdays; no loud music or parties are permitted after 9 p.m.
Bicycles left unregistered for more than six months will be removed and donated to charity.
Visitor spaces are limited to four hours; residents must display their permit at all times.

banco_opciones.H: lost and found office (reservada para el ejemplo 0)

avisos.texto_aviso: This door must remain unlocked and unobstructed at all times during opening hours.
A trained staff member is available here to treat minor cuts, burns, and fainting.
In case of alarm, proceed calmly to the car park on the north side of the building and wait for further instructions.
Fines apply to anyone caught lighting a cigarette within 10 meters of this sign.
All bags will be scanned and visitors may be asked to walk through the metal detector.
